reasoning: The question asks if the album "The Life of a Showgirl" will be #1 for 0 straight weeks on the Billboard 200, which according to the resolution criteria happens if it fails to debut at #1 or isn't released. Since the album has undeniably debuted at #1 and spent multiple consecutive weeks there, the likelihood of it remaining at #1 for exactly "0 straight weeks" is essentially impossible.
